message:
style(ui): break long method chains in detail scroll calculations

Reformats three instances of `.get().saturating_sub(...)` chains in
the detail scroll handling (CursorJumped, DetailScrolled, PageScrolled
match arms) to span multiple lines, keeping each method call on its
own line per the project's formatting conventions.

No logic changes — purely whitespace/line-break reformatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
